notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: David Hamilton reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: David Hamilton reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca flies out to right fielder Sal Frelick.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Carson Williams out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cedric Mullins plunked
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Cedric Mullins hit by pitch.
